changelog: FIX: Screen recorder no longer crashes on NVIDIA Shield. The previous build used a low-level MediaCodec+MediaMuxer pipeline that tripped a known Android 11 NullPointerException inside MediaCodec's internal display listener. Switched to MediaRecorder which sidesteps the bug entirely. 1080p / 30 fps / 8 Mbps, video only for now — audio will return in a follow-up build.
Settings → SCREEN RECORDER card behaviour is unchanged: press once to start, navigate freely, press again (or tap Stop in the notification) to finish + upload.
